Logging and utility functions for data and event logging using Protocol Buffers in Pebble firmware.


## Files
- **[protobuf_log.c](protobuf_log.c.md)**: Implements logging functionality using Protocol Buffers for data and event logging sessions.
- **[protobuf_log.h](protobuf_log.h.md)**: Handles the collection and transmission of protobuf payloads to a phone using defined schemas and data logging.
- **[protobuf_log_activity_sessions.c](protobuf_log_activity_sessions.c.md)**: Functions for creating, adding, and decoding activity session logs using protobuf in Pebble firmware.
- **[protobuf_log_activity_sessions.h](protobuf_log_activity_sessions.h.md)**: Functions for creating, adding to, and decoding activity session logs using Protobuf.
- **[protobuf_log_hr.c](protobuf_log_hr.c.md)**: Implements heart rate logging using protobuf, including quality conversion and sample addition.
- **[protobuf_log_hr.h](protobuf_log_hr.h.md)**: Functions for creating and adding heart rate samples to a protobuf log.
- **[protobuf_log_private.h](protobuf_log_private.h.md)**: Defines internal structures and configurations for managing protobuf log sessions.
- **[protobuf_log_test.c](protobuf_log_test.c.md)**: Tests and decodes protobuf log data, including measurements and events, for debugging purposes.
- **[protobuf_log_test.h](protobuf_log_test.h.md)**: Functions for decoding encoded payloads with measurement sets and events for debugging and unit tests.
- **[protobuf_log_util.c](protobuf_log_util.c.md)**: Utility functions for encoding various data types into protobuf logs.
- **[protobuf_log_util.h](protobuf_log_util.h.md)**: Defines structures and callback functions for encoding UUIDs, strings, varints, types, and buffers in protobuf logs.
